narrative:
Newark 7-A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,136 registered voters, with 69.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.2 percentage points.
